mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.goods_name AS goodsName, g.goods_price AS goodsPrice, g.goods_stock AS goodsStock, g.goods_desc AS goodsDesc, g.create_time AS createTime, g.update_time AS updateTime, g.category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName FROM goods g LEFT JOIN category c ON g.category_id = c.id

SELECT g.id, g.goods_name AS goodsName, g.goods_price AS goodsPrice, g.goods_stock AS goodsStock, g.goods_desc AS goodsDesc, g.create_time AS createTime, g.update_time AS updateTime, g.category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName FROM goods g LEFT JOIN category c ON g.category_id = c.id WHERE g.id=#{id}

SELECT g.id, g.goods_name AS goodsName, g.goods_price AS goodsPrice, g.goods_stock AS goodsStock, g.goods_desc AS goodsDesc, g.create_time AS createTime, g.update_time AS updateTime, g.category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName FROM goods g LEFT JOIN category c ON g.category_id = c.id WHERE g.goods_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{name},'%')
mapper.update: UPDATE goods SET goods_name=#{goodsName}, goods_price=#{goodsPrice}, goods_stock=#{goodsStock}, goods_desc=#{goodsDesc}, update_time=#{updateTime}, category_id=#{categoryId} WHERE id=#{id}
